productDisplayName: ADIDAS Mumbai Indians Men Blue Fan T-shirt
description: Composition Blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester engineered with ClimaLite technology, has short sleeves with yellow piping on the cuffs, mesh fabric along the sides at the hem for breathability, Mumbai Indians printed on the left chest, adidas brand logo on the right chest, patented adidas 3-Stripes and gold trims on the shoulders Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry, dry clean or iron on print/trims/ logo Dry in shade Warm iron The Indian Premier League has kick started. You know you have the Gods of cricket on your team - show your appreciation for their super-human efforts by wearing this Mumbai Indians T-shirt from Adidas. Their motto is 'Play Like One' and you too can be part of that global team spirit which brings people together, defying all odds, to triumph at the highest level! With an all new look and design for the 2012 DLF IPL, the ClimaLite fabric keeps skin dry and comfortable during the heat of the day. So wear this stylish tee and cheer for your favourite team at the IPL. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18'
